---
title: "Code & Data"
---

## Open science and reproducibility

We develop and share code to support data analysis, visualisation, and reproducible research workflows. Our work emphasizes transparency, accessibility, and reusability across projects.

---

## GitHub

You can find all of our public code repositories on GitHub:

<div class="github-link">
  <a href="https://github.com/dangiacometti" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/github.png" class="github-icon">
    <span>GitHub Profile</span>
  </a>
</div>

---

## What you’ll find

- R scripts for data analysis  
- Code for meta-analyses and comparative methods  
- Tools for thermal biology and ecological data  
- Reproducible workflows for research projects  

---

## Selected repositories and data sets

Curated data sets associated with published and ongoing research projects.

<div class="repo-card">
  <h3>Borealis (Dataverse)</h3>
  <a href="https://borealisdata-ca.proxy.library.brocku.ca/dataverse/dv?q=giacometti" target="_blank">
    View data sets
  </a>
</div>

<div class="repo-card">
  <h3>Zenodo</h3>
  <a href="https://zenodo.org/search?q=metadata.creators.person_or_org.name%3A%22Giacometti%2C%20Danilo%22&l=list&p=1&s=10&sort=bestmatch" target="_blank">
    View data sets
  </a>
</div>
